No active CAD/BOM/design table uses the archived long-scale value as erhu geometry

evidence_to_record: Bridge height mass photo and response notes

pass_criteria: String gauges or product IDs are recorded
Player can stop/pull strings through usable pitch range without unsafe action
Generated images are labeled concept only and DXF/CAD/measurements remain authority
